package.name: nav2_diffusion_onnx
package.description: Optional ONNX Runtime inference backend for nav2_diffusion_planner: an OnnxTrajectoryModel implementing nav2_diffusion_core::TrajectoryModel (docs/architecture.md sections 5.2/7.2). Requires onnxruntime to be findable by CMake (onnxruntime_vendor, a system install, or CMAKE_PREFIX_PATH); it is not built by the default CI for that reason.
